title: Your trusted neighbour, your trusted agent: Cameron Klement sells & lets on the Western Heads
description: BUSINESS NEWS - For Cameron Klement, moving...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - For Cameron Klement, moving to Knysna a few years ago wasn’t just a change of address; it was coming home. Now firmly rooted in the community, he brings that local passion and firsthand knowledge to his role as a professional estate agent with the esteemed Seeff Knysna.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - For Cameron Klement, moving to Knysna a few years ago wasn’t just a change of address; it was coming home. Now firmly rooted in the community, he brings that local passion and firsthand knowledge to his role as a professional estate agent with the esteemed Seeff Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While Seeff provides a fantastic, family-like support network and a powerful national brand, Cameron’s focus is proudly hyper-local. He specialises in property sales and rentals specifically on the sought-after Western Heads, an area he knows and loves not just as an agent, but as a committed resident.","html":"While Seeff provides a fantastic, family-like support network and a powerful national brand, Cameron’s focus is proudly hyper-local. He specialises in property sales and rentals specifically on the sought-after Western Heads, an area he knows and loves not just as an agent, but as a committed resident."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Cameron’s dedication goes far beyond property boards. You’ll find him actively investing his time in the very fabric of the community:"},{"type":"list","items":["Committee Member of the Lake Brenton Residents Association.","Volunteer for the vital Western Heads Fire Management Unit.","Chairman of the Lake Brenton Neighbourhood Watch."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This area and its community mean everything to me,” says Cameron. “Understanding the market is one thing, but truly understanding the heartbeat of a neighbourhood, what makes it special, safe, and sustainable is what makes the real difference. When you work with me, you’re not just getting an agent; you’re getting a neighbour who is personally invested in the well-being of our streets and the value of your home.”","html":"“This area and its community mean everything to me,” says Cameron. “Understanding the market is one thing, but truly understanding the heartbeat of a neighbourhood, what makes it special, safe, and sustainable is what makes the real difference. When you work with me, you’re not just getting an agent; you’re getting a neighbour who is personally invested in the well-being of our streets and the value of your home.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you are looking to sell, buy, or rent on the Western Heads, partner with an agent who combines the professionalism of Seeff with the committed heart of a local.","html":"Whether you are looking to sell, buy, or rent on the Western Heads, partner with an agent who combines the professionalism of Seeff with the committed heart of a local."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Contact Cameron Klement at Seeff Knysna today for a genuine, community-focused property experience."},{"type":"list","items":["Cameron KlementProperty PractitionerB.SocSciFFC: 20237762648","Cell: 081 456 6587","Email: [email protected]"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
